title: PluginConfig
description: Schema for the codex-claude-bridge plugin's config.json. Defaults ship at <plugin-root>/config.json; per-machine overrides at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/codex-bridge/config.json shallow-merge over the defaults.

model.description: Codex model alias used for all commands.

api_base.description: Base URL for the Codex Chat Completions endpoint.

diff_files_threshold.description: Files-changed cutoff for sync-vs-background classification. Exceeding this triggers the background prompt unless explicit --background or --wait is set.

diff_loc_threshold.description: LOC-delta cutoff (insertions + deletions) for sync-vs-background classification.

max_retries.description: Max exponential-backoff retries for 429 / 5xx in transport.

log_level.description: Logger verbosity. 'debug' includes prompt bodies (locally only). Tokens are always redacted regardless of level.

context_token_budget.description: Maximum tokens of diff + file context bundled into the user prompt by adversarialEngine.collectContext.

oauth_client_id.description: OAuth client_id provisioned for the plugin. Filled in during Phase 0 source-inspection of the OpenAI reference plugin.

oauth_authorize_url.description: Override for the OAuth authorize endpoint.

oauth_token_url.description: Override for the OAuth token-exchange endpoint.

delegator_max_concurrent.description: Maximum Codex sub-jobs the implement-with-codex skill can run in parallel via scripts/codex/delegator.ts. Separate from the slash-command FIFO.

delegator_isolate_worktrees.description: If true, parallel delegations (A/B, Ralph) each run in a throwaway git worktree managed by scripts/git/worktree.ts. Off by default — the main working tree is used.
